---
title: "week12"
author: "Ben Elliott"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Script Settings and Resources
```{r}
library(tidyverse)       # data science tools
library(httr)            # data extract from Reddit JSON
library(jsonlite)        # data extract from Reddit JSON
library(tm)              # pre-processing
library(qdap)            # pre-processing
library(textclean)       # pre-processing (emojis)
library(textstem)        # pre-processing
library(RWeka)           # n-gram DTM
library(stm)             # tuning a LDA Model (Topic Extraction)
```


# Data Import and Cleaning
```{r}
# url <- "https://www.reddit.com/r/IOPsychology/.json?limit=100"
# after <- NULL
# all_posts <- list()
# 
# for (i in 1:6) {  
#   full_url <- paste0(url, if (!is.null(after)) paste0("&after=", after) else "")
#   res <- fromJSON(full_url)
#   posts <- res$data$children$data
#   all_posts[[i]] <- posts
#   after <- res$data$after
#   if (is.null(after)) break
#   Sys.sleep(1)  # important to avoid rate limits
# }
# 
# week12_tbl <- bind_rows(all_posts) %>% 
#   select(title, ups, created_utc) %>% 
#   mutate(
#     created_utc = as.POSIXct(created_utc, origin = "1970-01-01")
#   ) %>% 
#   filter(created_utc > Sys.Date() - 365) %>% 
#   select(-created_utc) %>% 
#   write_csv("../data/iopsych_scrape_data.csv")

week12_tbl <- read_csv("../data/iopsych_scrape_data.csv")
```


```{r corpus generation}
io_corpus_original <- VCorpus(VectorSource(week12_tbl$title))

io_corpus <- io_corpus_original %>% 
  tm_map(content_transformer(replace_abbreviation)) %>% #("eu", "phd", "bs", "mba")
  tm_map(content_transformer(replace_contraction)) %>%
  tm_map(content_transformer(str_to_lower)) %>%
  tm_map(content_transformer(replace_emoji)) %>%
  tm_map(removeNumbers) %>%
  tm_map(removePunctuation) %>%
  tm_map(content_transformer(lemmatize_words)) %>% #from textstem so needs content_transformer() wrapper
  tm_map(removeWords, 
         c(stopwords("en"), 
           "io", "i/o", "i-o", "I/Os","industrial", "organizational",
           "psych", "psychology", "psychologis[ts]", "/r/IOpsychology")) %>% #added common IO Psych words
  tm_map(stripWhitespace) %>% 
  tm_map(stemDocument, language="english")
```

```{r compre them function}
compare_them <- function(corp1, corp2) {
  i <- sample(1:length(corp1), 1)
  print(corp1[[i]]$content)
  print(corp2[[i]]$content)
}
```

```{r }
compare_them(io_corpus_original, io_corpus)
```

```{r create dtm}
io_dtm <- DocumentTermMatrix(io_corpus)
io_dtm <- as.matrix(io_dtm)
```

```{r}
myTokenizer <- function(x) { NGramTokenizer(x, Weka_control(min=1, max=2)) }
io_slim_dtm <- DocumentTermMatrix(
  io_corpus, 
  control = list(tokenize = myTokenizer))
# slimmed_dtm <- removeSparseTerms(DTM, .97)
# DTM_tbl <- slimmed_dtm %>% as.matrix %>% as_tibble
```


# Analysis
```{r analysis}
dtm_stm <- readCorpus(io_slim_dtm, type="slam")
kresult <- searchK(
  dtm_stm$documents,
  dtm_stm$vocab,
  K = seq(2, 20, by = 2)
)
plot(kresult)
topic_model <- stm(dtm_stm$documents, 
                   dtm_stm$vocab, 
                   7)
```



# Visualization 

# Publication
